home.headline: ZRIK
home.copy: Choose the best driver. Choose the best price.
home.stepsLead: ZRIK is an exclusive marketplace: define the trip, receive offers, choose with full control.
home.step1Body: Origin, destination, and what matters along the way.
home.step2Body: Verified drivers reply with price and vehicle.
home.step3Body: Compare, accept, and travel with transparency.

how.title: How ZRIK works
how.lead: A private-chauffeur marketplace reduced to the essentials: request, propose, choose.

forDrivers.title: Drive with intention
forDrivers.lead: See open requests, set your price, and grow with verified trust.

branding.title: Branding Preview
branding.lead: Compare the three typographic ZRIK logo variants. The premium identity uses deep black and electric blue.
branding.optionBDesc: Z in #1E5EFF · RIK in #0A0A0B. Technology + trust.
branding.optionC: Option C — Z and K in blue
branding.optionCDesc: Z and K in #1E5EFF · RI in #0A0A0B.
branding.note: Option B is the product default. Sora typography · no 3D icon.
